description: v1: normalize winlog.event_data.Data polymorphism. Object shape kept structured + stringified to Data_raw. Non-object (string/list/scalar) removed from Data (preventing object-mapping conflict) + value preserved in Data_raw. Never rejects a document — both script-level and pipeline-level on_failure handlers defensively strip Data and record the error in a sidecar field so the doc always indexes. Script accepts both nested (ctx.winlog.event_data) and flat-dotted-key (ctx['winlog.event_data']) document shapes — parse_evtx emits the flat form, synthetic test docs use the nested form.

script.source: def ed = ctx.winlog?.event_data; if (ed == null) { ed = ctx['winlog.event_data']; } if (ed == null) { return; } def d = ed.Data; if (d == null) { return; } if (d instanceof Map) { ed.Data_raw = d.toString(); } else { ed.Data_raw = String.valueOf(d); ed.remove('Data'); }
